scripts.dev:turbo: node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs exec turbo run dev --filter=@alchemist/web-app
scripts.go: node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs install && node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs --filter @alchemist/web-app dev
scripts.go:fresh: node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs install && node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs run web:dev:fresh
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/web-app/.next apps/mobile-app/.expo .turbo && node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs exec turbo daemon stop 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.web:rebuild: node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs run clean && node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs exec turbo run build --filter=@alchemist/web-app --force
scripts.web:dev:fresh: node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs run clean && node scripts/with-pnpm.mjs --filter @alchemist/web-app dev
